description: No edge case defines a maximum tag string length. The tryNewTag function (try-new-tag.ts) applies only semantic validation (empty check, whitespace check, normalization) but no length constraint. A malicious or accidental input of 10,000 characters would pass validation, be stored as a Tag, and potentially cause layout overflow in tag chips (which are capped at max-width 160px with ellipsis in EC-013) and storage bloat. The spec should either define a length limit or explicitly accept unbounded length and handle it in the UI.
